notes:
vMLX 1.5.58 checkpoint release

Highlights:
- Fresh signed and notarized checkpoint build from current vMLX Python engine/app source at commit 08d8fcc5d.
- Bundles vmlx_engine 1.5.58 and the current jang 2.5.31 runtime package surface.
- Carries the current Qwen/Qwen-coder Responses tool-call streaming fixes, missing required argument fail-closed behavior, function-call argument delta/done surfaces, output-index validation, and tool-result continuation.
- Carries current Gemma4/JANG/QAT/MXFP runtime and bundled-app parity fixes, including Gemma4 unified runtime registration and JANG/JANGTQ loader parity.
- Keeps release manifest truth visible: this is a usable checkpoint release, not a claim that every open runtime/model-family row is production-green.

Verification:
- Built Sequoia and Tahoe arm64 DMGs from vMLX 1.5.58 source at commit 08d8fcc5d.
- Bundled Python verified vMLX engine version 1.5.58, critical vMLX source hash parity, critical jang_tools source hash parity, relocatable console-script shebangs, and critical runtime imports.
- Sequoia DMG accepted by Apple notarization id d94933ed-ba35-4d45-a4f5-5e9c8ce8ff1a, stapled, Gatekeeper accepted, and verified by panel/scripts/verify-release-dmgs.sh.
- Tahoe DMG accepted by Apple notarization id 8615b942-0b30-4aea-a805-f62c49895ca2, stapled, Gatekeeper accepted, and verified by panel/scripts/verify-release-dmgs.sh.
- Checkpoint prepackage manifest was generated with explicit override because the full live model matrix still has open rows.

Known follow-up:
- This checkpoint does not claim full production-green status for all large model-family rows.
- Remaining proof work includes selected deployed/tunnel parity, larger live model-family rows, UI/media rows, and PyPI publishing configuration.

DMG SHA256:
- Sequoia: 71925fa21857a631c7fdddfd14b217cef8e076a3ce88fb82439672a0196bd7f4
- Tahoe: ffa671547b0de037d9e5257589f29d8e29c5cebb7358c127ed0a90b6925040dc
